summary: Iteration 4 testing - Code Quality Refactoring verification. All 5 backend API tests pass. All frontend pages load correctly without crashes. Add Vehicle modal (AddVehicleModal.jsx) renders with all fields. VehicleDetail shows financial summary cards and tabs. Charts render on Dashboard, Finance, Reports. No React hook errors (useMemo/useEffect) observed.

design_issues.screen: All pages with select/option elements (Inventory, Marketing)
issues: Emergent visual editor injects <span data-ve-dynamic> inside <select>/<tbody>/<tr> causing hydration warnings in console - NOT an app code issue, comes from the Emergent preview environment's visual editor tooling

critical_code_review_comments: VehicleDetail page URL is /inventory/{id} not /vehicle/{id} - minor but can cause confusion in routing
All refactoring changes (extracted modals, useMemo fixes, helper functions) verified working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, modals work, charts render)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Previous 3 iterations all passed. This iteration verified code quality refactoring: AddVehicleModal.jsx and VehicleModals.jsx extracted components work. Backend helper functions (_vehicle_investment, _vendor_payable, etc.) tested via /api/reports/dashboard and /api/finance/summary. Dashboard field names: 'available' (not 'available_count'). All charts render without crash. App uses sessionStorage key 'gng_token'. Vehicle detail URL pattern is /inventory/{uuid}.
